16#BW| 17#MP|--- 18#RW| 19#BT|## What is plugsuits? 20#NW| 21#QR|In *Neon Genesis Evangelion*, a **plugsuit** is the neural interface between a pilot and their Evangelion — form-fitting, minimal, and essential. Without it, synchronization doesn't happen. 22#YM| 23#ZM|**plugsuits** takes the same approach to AI agents. A lightweight TypeScript harness that connects any LLM to code editing, file operations, and shell execution — with nothing more than what's needed. 24#NB| 25#HB|No framework overhead. 65#JX|``` 66#KH|$ pnpm dev 67#SS| 68#VK|Chat with AI (model: LGAI-EXAONE/K-EXAONE-236B-A23B) 69#QP|Use '/help' for commands, 'ctrl-c' to quit 70#RX| 71#QP|You: what files are in the src directory? 72#QS|tool: read_file({"path":"src"}) 73#YT|AI: Here's what's in the src directory... 74#YW| 75#VZ|You: /help 76#XS|Available commands: 77#BR| /help Show this help message 78#VH| /clear Clear Core agent loop, message history, tool management 101#RQ|│ │ 102#HJ|│ └── cea/ @ai-sdk-tool/cea 103#WT|│ ├── src/ 104#QP|│ │ ├── entrypoints/ CLI (interactive) + headless (JSONL) runtimes 105#BJ|│ │ reasoning_content:
README에서 이 프로젝트는 AI 에이전트 하네스(harness)로, Vercel AI SDK 기반의 "플러그 슈트"입니다. 코드 편집, 파일 작업, 셸 실행을 위한 도구를 제공하며, 인터랙티브 TUI와 헤드리스 모드를 지원합니다. packages 디렉토리에 harness와 cea (Code Editing Agent)가 있습니다.

이제 packages 디렉토리를 살펴보겠습니다.
